name: Qawale
author: Abstract Games factory (game by Romain Froger & Didier Lenain-Bragard, Gigamic 2022)
description: Qawale (Romain Froger & Didier Lenain-Bragard, Gigamic 2022): a 4x4 stacking race inspired by wayside stone piles. Place one of your 8 pebbles on any stack, then pick the whole stack up and sow it: one pebble per square along an orthogonal path, bottom pebble first, never doubling straight back. The first line of four of your colour on top of the stacks - row, column or diagonal - wins; sow carelessly and you lay your opponent's line for them. Two neutral pebbles start stacked on each corner.
